Feedback Text: We finally shipped the dark mode toggle. We didn't do any user testing, but the CEO really wanted it by Friday so we made it happen.
User complained about the new dashboard layout. We'll log it, but we can't change it right now because we're heads down on the next big feature release.
We hit our outcome metric for signups, but the board is asking why we haven't shipped the AI assistant yet. We might need to pivot resources.
Users like the core product but are confused by the new 'Pro' features. I think we built too much too fast without validating if it solved a real problem.
Big enterprise prospect says they won't sign unless we build a custom SSO integration by next month. Sales VP is pushing us to commit to the timeline.
Good sprint, we delivered all committed story points. But I feel like we're just blindly executing the roadmap without knowing if any of this moves the needle.
Five tickets today asking how to use the reporting tool. We should probably design a better empty state, but it's not on the roadmap.
The new flow is technically functional, but the cognitive load is very high. I recommend we simplify it before launch, but leadership says we can't delay the release date.
NPS is flat. We shipped 3 major features this quarter but users don't seem to care or notice.
We're accumulating a lot of technical debt by rushing these features out the door to meet arbitrary deadlines.
